case_title: RENEE WHEELER VS. CALIFORNIA STATE BAR ASSN. et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON APR-25-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF RENEE WHEELER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
